length_mix.rule: runtime of 60 minutes or more counts as feature-length

taxonomy.method: Our own grouping, not the channel's: ordered keyword rules over titles (first match wins; Spanish detected by Spanish words; bare titles with a classic 20-35 min episode runtime count as vintage TV), plus a one-time AI labeling pass that placed 294 titles no rule matched (frozen in data/labels/video_title_labels.json with its own provenance). Titles neither rules nor the labeler could place stay Unclassified.

catalog_categories.note: Catalog merchandising categories; a video may appear in more than one category, so counts do not sum to the channel total.

notes: www.usps.org (the parent organization's legacy site) answered one request at the start of the session, then became unreachable from every network tried (local client, browser, and a remote fetcher all timed out), so its pages could not be collected — the site appears to be down or heavily throttled. Its links are still counted in the link graph.
portal.americasboatingclub.org is a members-only iMIS portal; only its public login/news pages were collected.
store.shopusps.org's robots.txt asks crawlers to wait 20 seconds between requests, which was honored.

tech._about: Per-property analytics tags and tech platform, detected from saved raw HTML by derive/detect_tech.py. Blank analytics = scanned, none found. 'not crawled' = no pages on disk (site down or root errored). Nothing here is taken from the external audit.

properties.platform_evidence: generator meta "Helix Ultimate - The Most Popular Joomla! Template Framework."
properties.generator_meta: Helix Ultimate - The Most Popular Joomla! Template Framework.

properties.platform_evidence: generator meta "Joomla! - Open Source Content Management"
properties.role: Legacy parent / member site — homepage captured live 2026-06-14

properties.platform_evidence: no high-confidence platform signal in crawled pages
form posts to a .php endpoint on 1/1 pages
properties.role: Paid courseware (LMS) — login-gated; sign-in page captured live 2026-06-14

clubs.description: Complete club/squadron directory obtained by replaying the find-a-club search (Joomla com_mymaplocations) that the americasboatingclub.org page itself performs, across overlapping circles that blanket all US states, territories and overseas locations.
clubs.strategy: oversized-radius circles (server honors radius 3000 mi beyond the UI's 500 mi cap)

class_schedule.description: National upcoming-class schedule assembled by fetching each club's club-details page (the same page a visitor sees after using Find a Club) and parsing its server-rendered 'Upcoming Educational Courses' section. The link below opens one real club's page; the sqdno query parameter is that club's squadron number — change it to view any other club's schedule.

store_products.description: Every product listed in the Ship's Store catalog (store.shopusps.org, a NetSuite SiteBuilder store), harvested from the category listing pages which show each product's name, item code and price.
store_products.mode: re-parsed from raw HTML saved by an earlier fetch run

satellite_stores.description: ABC-branded storefronts on vendor domains, linked from the Ship's Store homepage. C.P. Dean product data comes from Shopify's public collection products.json, which cpdean.com's robots.txt explicitly marks as crawlable.

education_catalog.description: Every page under /index.php/courses/<category>/<name> and /index.php/seminars/<category>/<name> on the main site. Titles come from each page's H1, descriptions from its meta description tag.

enrolmart_products.description: Every EnrolMart page whose HTML contains an <h2 class="product-price"> tag — i.e. an actual product page. Prices are read from that tag verbatim.

videos.description: One record per video page on americasboatingchannel.uscreen.io (/programs/...), read from the schema.org VideoObject JSON-LD each page embeds. Pages lacking that block are counted and skipped, never guessed.

pages.description: One record per URL the crawler handled, with per-domain totals. Source of truth is data/crawl/index.jsonl.

link_graph.description: Cross-links between the crawled ABC properties, plus every external domain those pages link to, counted from the outlink lists in the crawl index. Club websites come from the interactive club directory capture.

content_dates.description: Per-URL <lastmod> stamps copied from the sitemap XML files the crawler saved. These are the sites' own statements of when each page last changed.
